changeSet.author: shelf-storage-update
changeSet.comment: Add 'general' as a valid location type to support shelf-level storage assignment. Some laboratories do not use rack/box hierarchy and need to assign samples directly to shelf level with location_type = 'general'.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_assignment DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_location_type_valid;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.sample_storage_assignment DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_location_type_valid;
